name: Corner Post
description_short: Corner Post FCU is a member-owned credit union offering loans, checking/savings accounts, and financial services to eligible members with competitive rates and personalized service.
description_long:
Corner Post Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving its community with a range of consumer and member financial services. The credit union maintains a physical presence with branch and ATM locations, supported by digital banking channels for member convenience.

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of loan products including vehicle loans (2.75%-7.50% APR for new autos), home equity lines of credit (5.00% APR fixed for 0-36 months), signature loans (2.50% APR when 100% share-secured), personal loans, student loans, and specialty toy loans. On the deposit side, Corner Post provides checking and savings accounts, share certificates, Individual Retirement Accounts, and club savings accounts. Members also have access to Visa credit cards and debit cards, online and mobile banking platforms, bill pay services, and overdraft protection.

Corner Post differentiates itself through member-focused services including a Dollar Dog Kids Club youth financial literacy program, scholarship applications, enterprise car sales partnerships, debt protection products, and TruStage insurance offerings. The institution emphasizes personalized customer service and quick loan pre-approvals, as evidenced by member testimonials highlighting staff helpfulness and responsiveness.

As a credit union, Corner Post's primary limitation is membership eligibility—not all consumers can join. The website does not clearly specify membership requirements or geographic service areas, which could create friction for prospective members. Rates advertised appear competitive for credit unions but require individual qualification. The institution serves a specific community base rather than offering national availability.
services: Vehicle loans (autos, motorcycles, RVs) with competitive rates
Home equity loans/lines of credit with variable and fixed rates
Checking and savings accounts with direct deposit and payroll deduction
Share certificates and Individual Retirement Accounts
Home banking and mobile app access
Youth financial education program (Dollar Dog Kids Club)
pros: Very competitive APRs on signature loans (2.50%) and new auto loans starting at 2.75%
Fixed-rate home equity products with quick approvals
Free Dollar Dog Kids Club youth financial literacy program for member families
Multiple account types including IRAs, club accounts, and share certificates
Mobile app and online banking with bill pay and direct deposit options
Member testimonials highlight exceptional personalized customer service
NCUA insurance protection on deposits (standard for credit unions)
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly defined on website, creating potential barriers to entry
Limited geographic or eligibility information makes it unclear who can actually join
No mention of specific membership fees, minimum balances, or account requirements
Website does not provide full rate details or borrowing limits for loan products
Not available to the general public—membership-restricted access unlike banks
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto and personal loan rates with personalized service
Families wanting youth financial education through the Dollar Dog Kids Club program
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit with fixed rates and quick approval
Existing members or eligible employees looking for comprehensive financial services in one institution
diagnosis: Corner Post FCU is best for existing members or employees of eligible groups seeking competitive loan rates and comprehensive financial services with a community-oriented approach. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted and not clearly detailed on their website, so prospective customers should contact the credit union directly at (570) 823-6151 to confirm if they qualify.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Corner Post — Credit Union in Wilkes Barre, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Corner Post — NCUA-insured credit union in Wilkes Barre, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
